original_snippet_context: Report on the day's exchange rates and Brazilian bond quotes on the London Stock Exchange.
relevant_quote: A' taxa de 15 3/8 que foi a official de hontem, para letras a 90 dias de vista, a libra esterlina vale 15$000, o franco 5$620 e o marco 5$763. A' vista (15 1/2), a libra vale 15$737, o franco 5$621 e o marco 5$772, a lira italiana 5$621, cem réis fortes 5$159 e o dollar 3$213.
justification: This snippet provides factual information on the exchange rate of the mil-réis against other currencies, without expressing an opinion about the Caixa de Conversão or a specific conversion rate.
